ext.description: Pick template × tool (claude/codex/gemini/cursor/windsurf/cline/aider/continue) checkboxes in the sidebar to install into a new folder. Workspace-root auto-detected so already-installed tools are disabled. Promote an existing folder into a user template. Right-click a user template to rename/delete/reveal.

cfg.defaultTool: Default tool pre-selected during the apply-template tool-picker step. Must match the <tool> folder name under <template>/<tool>/.

welcome.empty:
No templates yet.
[Promote a folder into a User Template](command:vibecodeAiMdSystem.promoteTemplate)
[Refresh](command:vibecodeAiMdSystem.refreshTemplates)

commands.initTemplateHere: Vibecode - Init Agent Definition Template Here
commands.promoteTemplate: Vibecode - Promote Folder to User Template

runtime.Will be appended after the timestamp pre: Will be appended after the timestamp prefix (yymmddhhmmss-<name>).
runtime.Use only letters, digits, dot, underscor: Use only letters, digits, dot, underscore, or hyphen.
runtime.No upstream_url set. Edit the JSON to ad: No upstream_url set. Edit the JSON to add one.
runtime.Stub: would {0}. Sync logic is not imple: Stub: would {0}. Sync logic is not implemented in v0.1.
runtime.Apply Template must be invoked from the: Apply Template must be invoked from the sidebar (no provider attached).
runtime.No tool variants selected. Check items i: No tool variants selected. Check items in the sidebar first.
runtime.{0} file(s) already exist in the target: {0} file(s) already exist in the target folder. Overwrite?
runtime.No known tool markers found in this fold: No known tool markers found in this folder. Looking for: {0}
runtime.Tools detected — select which to promote: Tools detected — select which to promote
runtime.Saved user template \"{0}\" ({1} tool(s): Saved user template "{0}" ({1} tool(s), {2} marker(s)). Refreshing sidebar.
runtime.Pick a folder to promote into a user tem: Pick a folder to promote into a user template
runtime.Right-click a user template (👤 group) to: Right-click a user template (👤 group) to delete it.
runtime.This removes {0} permanently. Bundled te: This removes {0} permanently. Bundled templates are unaffected.
runtime.Right-click a user template (👤 group) to: Right-click a user template (👤 group) to rename it.
runtime.Right-click a tool variant (☐ leaf) to r: Right-click a tool variant (☐ leaf) to re-install.
runtime.Open a workspace folder first — re-insta: Open a workspace folder first — re-install targets the workspace root.
runtime.Force re-install \"{0}/{1}\" → {2}? {3}: Force re-install "{0}/{1}" → {2}? {3} file(s) will be overwritten.
